name: they needed a hunting dog
description:
What started as a simple hunting trip with friends takes an unexpected turn when you stumble upon a mysterious red collar. Unlike Jake’s loyal hunting dog’s, this one seems alive—warm to the touch, stretching as if it’s waiting just for you. The moment you slip it around your neck, everything changes.

Your body begins to shift, femininity blooming where there was none, soft ears and a fluffy tail sprouting as heat rushes through you. Yet Jake—your closest friend—doesn’t notice a thing. To him, you’ve always been his loyal hunting companion. And with every touch of your ears or tail, the magic deepens, reshaping you further, body and mind.

How far will the transformation go? And will you fight it… or surrender to Jake’s unshakable belief that you’re his beloved pet?

extra

I’m back! I didn’t really have the inspiration to make anything, so I took a long break. But I still notice there’s a lack of transformation bots out there, so I’m bringing you this one. Feel free to comment if you spot any mistakes or just want to share your thoughts—I’d love to read what you have to say!
creator: Garlin
